intro: Urban Sport merchandise carries the same black-and-gold identity as the clubs, with custom name application and sponsor-backed tournament styling.
orderIntro: Orders are handled directly on WhatsApp so the club team can confirm names, sizes, and final pickup details without friction.

items.name: Tournament T-Shirt Pack
items.description: A two-shirt package built around the Urban Sport tournament apparel system shown in the source poster.
items.customization: With the name of your choice
